scope: Events, webhooks, risk controls, admin reporting, optional advanced features

features.description: Implement domain events with transactional outbox
steps: Define base domain event contract
Create outbox message persistence model
Persist outbox records in same transaction as domain writes
Add background dispatcher and handlers

features.description: Add merchant webhooks with HMAC signatures and retry policy
steps: Create webhook subscription model
Sign outgoing payloads with merchant secret
Implement delivery retry with backoff
Store webhook delivery attempt records

features.description: Add rate limiting and velocity-based anti-abuse checks
steps: Implement request rate limiter for login and payment creation
Add transfer velocity window policy
Block or hold payments when threshold exceeded
Return stable error response for violations

features.description: Implement risk engine v1 with allow hold reject decisions
steps: Create risk engine decision contract
Record decision reasons linked to payment id
Integrate hold/reject behavior with payment flow
Expose risk decision trace for admin

features.description: Create admin read views for users payments and ledger entries
steps: Add admin query service
Implement list and search endpoints
Add payment drill-down including ledger entries
Enforce admin-only access

features.description: Add CSV export for transaction reporting
steps: Implement CSV serializer for filtered transactions
Add date range and status filters
Expose export endpoint with secure download
Validate report columns for gross fee net and timestamps

features.description: Prototype multi-currency wallet support with cross-currency restriction
steps: Extend wallet model for per-currency accounts
Update transfer validation to require same currency
Add rejection behavior for mixed-currency transfers
Create migration notes for future FX integration

features.description: Prototype CQRS balance projection read model
steps: Design projection schema
Update projector on ledger events
Add rebuild from ledger history command
Benchmark read latency against computed balance

features.description: Prototype event-sourcing mode for payment aggregate
steps: Define payment event stream schema
Implement aggregate replay
Add deterministic replay tests
Evaluate optional snapshot strategy
